description_en: Focusing on the research and development of large visual multi-modal models, the core team comes from Tsinghua University and has completed hundreds of millions of yuan in Pre-A round financing.
why_matters_en: Sequoia China and Baidu Venture Capital led the investment of several hundred million yuan (approximately $30M+). The core team originated from Tsinghua University and focuses on the research and development of visual multi-modal generation technology.

name: Red Bear AI
description: 提供人工智能、B2B软件、云计算和数据服务。
why_matters: 2026年1月Seed轮融资1144万美元，中国AI B2B领域快速增长。
description_en: Provides artificial intelligence, B2B software, cloud computing and data services.
why_matters_en: In January 2026, the Seed round of financing was US$11.44 million, and China’s AI B2B field is growing rapidly.

name: Obround
description: 开发AI穿戴设备、消费电子硬件和移动产品。
why_matters: 2026年1月刚获Pre-Seed融资，专注AI穿戴消费电子，新兴初创有潜力。
description_en: Develops AI wearable devices, consumer electronics hardware and mobile products.
why_matters_en: It just received Pre-Seed financing in January 2026. It focuses on AI wearable consumer electronics and has potential in emerging startups.

name: Orbital
description: AI平台自动化房地产法律流程，解决房地产交易法律基础设施现代化问题。
why_matters: 完成6000万美元B轮融资，针对房地产法律复杂性定制AI，市场机会巨大，现代化交易法律基础设施。
description_en: The AI ​​platform automates the real estate legal process and solves the problem of modernizing the legal infrastructure for real estate transactions.
why_matters_en: Completed US$60 million in Series B financing, customized AI for the complexity of real estate laws, huge market opportunities, and modernized transaction legal infrastructure.

name: Nscale
description: 伦敦全栈AI基础设施提供商，专注GPU云和AI训练平台。
why_matters: 2025年C轮3.77亿欧元，一个月前B轮破纪录，支持欧洲云计算AI竞赛。
description_en: London full-stack AI infrastructure provider, focusing on GPU cloud and AI training platform.
why_matters_en: The 2025 C round is 377 million euros, and the B round broke the record a month ago to support the European cloud computing AI competition.

name: Lambda
description: 提供基于NVIDIA GPU的AI模型训练云基础设施和软件服务。
why_matters: 2025年2月获4.8亿美元D轮融资NVIDIA参与，与CoreWeave竞争GPU云租赁市场，实现NVIDIA硬件垂直整合。
description_en: Provides NVIDIA GPU-based AI model training cloud infrastructure and software services.
why_matters_en: In February 2025, NVIDIA received US$480 million in Series D financing to compete with CoreWeave in the GPU cloud rental market and achieve vertical integration of NVIDIA hardware.

name: Opus
description: 为医疗、金融、保险等高监管行业提供AI原生工作流自动化平台，支持端到端任务执行并保持合规审计。
why_matters: 由Arbor Ventures领投Pre-Series B，350+员工，已在美国、欧洲、中东部署，用于自动化医疗理赔、KYC/AML验证等关键流程。
description_en: Provides an AI-native workflow automation platform for highly regulated industries such as medical care, finance, and insurance, supporting end-to-end task execution and maintaining compliance audits.
why_matters_en: Led by Arbor Ventures, Pre-Series B has 350+ employees and has been deployed in the United States, Europe, and the Middle East to automate key processes such as medical claims and KYC/AML verification.

name: Fabrica AI
description: 利用强化学习和仿真训练端到端控制系统，自动化机器人开发过程，已推出自动瓷砖填缝机器人提升5倍生产力。
why_matters: 已从Hoxton Ventures、Credo Ventures等筹集超300万美元，在新加坡、澳大利亚开始销售填缝机器人，并在美开展行业演示，验证AI系统并收集数据。
description_en: Using reinforcement learning and simulation training to train an end-to-end control system and automate the robot development process, an automatic tile caulking robot has been launched to increase productivity by 5 times.
why_matters_en: It has raised over US$3 million from Hoxton Ventures, Credo Ventures, etc., started selling caulking robots in Singapore and Australia, and carried out industry demonstrations in the United States to verify the AI ​​system and collect data.

name: aiXcoder
description: 全自研代码大模型，7B模型支持私有化部署，论文获ICSE 2025收录，专注AI Coding场景。
why_matters: 2024年4月开源7B代码模型，ICSE 2025论文收录，针对企业算力有限场景优化私有化部署
description_en: A large model of self-developed code, 7B model supports privatized deployment, the paper was included in ICSE 2025, focusing on AI Coding scenarios.
why_matters_en: Open source 7B code model in April 2024, included in ICSE 2025 papers, optimizing privatization deployment for scenarios with limited enterprise computing power

name: 穹彻智能
description: 研发具身智能基础模型和系统，提供Noematrix Brain大脑，支持力控抓取放置等技能，覆盖数据采集到部署全流程。
why_matters: 成立仅1年获红杉中国领投数亿元，单场景百套订单，首创以力为中心模型框架兼顾泛化性和落地性能。
description_en: Develop embodied intelligence basic models and systems, provide Noematrix Brain, support force-controlled grasping and placement and other skills, covering the entire process from data collection to deployment.
why_matters_en: Only one year after its establishment, it received hundreds of millions of dollars in investment led by Sequoia China and hundreds of orders for a single scenario. It is the first force-centered model framework to take into account generalization and implementation performance.

name: Moneta
description: 专注于B2B企业预构建与定制化AI Agents解决方案，强调行业化适配与持续优化能力。
why_matters: 专注B2B企业级AI Agents行业适配，近期发布强调持续优化差异化于通用智能体
description_en: Focus on pre-built and customized AI Agents solutions for B2B enterprises, emphasizing industry adaptation and continuous optimization capabilities.
why_matters_en: Focusing on B2B enterprise-level AI Agents industry adaptation, recent releases emphasize continuous optimization and differentiation in general-purpose agents.

name: Noumena
description: 前第四范式总裁创办的营销AI Agent平台，帮助品牌实现增长与决策智能化，已完成多轮融资用于产品迭代。
why_matters: 前第四范式总裁创办，数千万人民币Pre-A轮由狮城资本与百度战投投资，专注营销AI Agent品牌增长，累计多轮融资超预期
description_en: The marketing AI Agent platform founded by the former president of 4Paradigm helps brands achieve growth and intelligent decision-making. It has completed multiple rounds of financing for product iteration.
why_matters_en: Founded by the former president of 4Paradigm, the Pre-A round of tens of millions of yuan was invested by Lion City Capital and Baidu Venture Capital. It focuses on marketing AI Agent brand growth, and has accumulated multiple rounds of financing exceeding expectations.

name: Superb AI
description: 视觉AI全栈解决方案企业，目标明年上市。
why_matters: 2025年12月调达约1.48亿美元Pre-IPO，Hanwha和POSCO参与，明年IPO计划显示强劲增长势头。
description_en: A visual AI full-stack solution company that aims to go public next year.
why_matters_en: A Pre-IPO of approximately US$148 million will be allocated in December 2025, with Hanwha and POSCO participating, and next year’s IPO plan shows strong growth momentum.

name: Elyos AI
description: 伦敦初创公司构建AI代理，用于贸易和现场服务自动化客户沟通、预约和调度。
why_matters: Blackbird Ventures领投€11.1M A轮，专注AI代理自动化现场服务，针对蓝领行业痛点，具有高扩展潜力。
description_en: London startup builds AI agents to automate customer communications, bookings and scheduling for trade and field services.
why_matters_en: Blackbird Ventures led the €11.1M Series A investment, focusing on AI agent automated field services, targeting the pain points of the blue-collar industry and having high expansion potential.

name: Physical Robotics
description: 1X人形机器人发明者创办的工厂机器人初创，计划Q3部署客户现场。
why_matters: 1X人形机器人核心发明人创办，目标今年Q3上客户现场，到2031年产10万台机器人。
description_en: A factory robot start-up founded by the inventor of 1X humanoid robot, plans to deploy it to customer sites in Q3.
why_matters_en: Founded by the core inventor of 1X humanoid robot, it aims to go to customer sites in Q3 this year and produce 100,000 robots by 2031.

name: UMEVO Note Plus
description: 专业级AI录音设备，支持40小时连续录音、电话通话振动捕捉和首年免费无限转录，符合SOC 2/HIPAA/GDPR标准。
why_matters: 创新磁性振动传感器完美录制电话双边通话，64GB存储+60天待机，首年免费无限AI转录，总拥有成本最低，专业用户首选。
description_en: Professional-grade AI recording equipment, supports 40 hours of continuous recording, phone call vibration capture and free unlimited transcription for the first year, and complies with SOC 2/HIPAA/GDPR standards.
why_matters_en: The innovative magnetic vibration sensor perfectly records bilateral calls, 64GB storage + 60 days of standby, free unlimited AI transcription in the first year, the lowest total cost of ownership, and the first choice for professional users.

name: SEA-LION
description: 东南亚首个开源多语言多模态大语言模型家族，支持11+种东南亚语言，捕捉区域文化与语境。
why_matters: 东南亚首个本土化LLM，训练数据东南亚语言占比13%（Llama 2仅0.5%），下载量超235,000次，已被GoTo Group等企业采用，填补区域低资源语言空白。
description_en: Southeast Asia's first open source multi-lingual multi-modal large language model family supports 11+ Southeast Asian languages ​​and captures regional culture and context.
why_matters_en: Southeast Asia's first localized LLM, Southeast Asian languages ​​account for 13% of the training data (Llama 2 is only 0.5%), and has been downloaded more than 235,000 times. It has been adopted by companies such as GoTo Group to fill the gap in low-resource languages ​​in the region.

name: 浙江人形机器人创新中心
description: 由浙大熊蓉教授团队与宁波市政府共建，专注具身智能人形机器人关键技术和产业化应用
why_matters: 融资速度快，过去一年半累计融资22亿元；创始人熊蓉为浙大教授、博士生导师，在机器人领域有20年研究积累；股东阵容豪华，包括中控技术、招商创科、联想创投、浙江省创业投资集团等产业资本和政府资本；国家地方共建人形机器人创新中心依托主体
funding_total: 累计融资22亿元，最新4.5亿元Pre-A轮
description_en: Jointly built by Professor Xiong Rong’s team from Zhejiang University and the Ningbo Municipal Government, it focuses on key technologies and industrial applications of embodied intelligent humanoid robots.
why_matters_en: The financing speed is fast, with a total of 2.2 billion yuan raised in the past year and a half; the founder Xiong Rong is a professor and doctoral supervisor at Zhejiang University, with 20 years of research accumulation in the field of robotics; the shareholder lineup is luxurious, including industrial capital and government capital such as Central Control Technology, China Merchants Innovation and Technology, Lenovo Venture Capital, and Zhejiang Venture Capital Group; the national and local humanoid robot innovation center relies on the main body

name: 智元机器人
description: 全球首家实现人形机器人规模化量产和商业化落地的企业，以AI+机器人深度融合构建优势
why_matters: 2025年全球人形机器人出货量排名第一，交付超5168台占近四成市场份额；成立仅2年多完成多轮融资，累计融资超数十亿元；业内唯一实现全产品系列、全场景布局的企业，灵犀X2机器人适配文娱表演、展厅讲解等多元场景
description_en: The world's first company to achieve large-scale mass production and commercialization of humanoid robots, building advantages through the deep integration of AI + robots
why_matters_en: Ranked first in global humanoid robot shipments in 2025, with more than 5,168 units delivered, accounting for nearly 40% of the market share; it has completed multiple rounds of financing in just over 2 years since its establishment, with cumulative financing exceeding billions of yuan; the only company in the industry to achieve a full product series and full scene layout, Lingxi X2 robot is suitable for diverse scenes such as entertainment performances and exhibition hall explanations

name: 面壁智能
description: 专注端侧多模态大模型，推出MiniCPM系列小钢炮模型，以小博大实现高效低成本端侧AI部署。
why_matters: 2025年再获数亿元融资，MiniCPM系列下载量破1000万，8B参数模型获20B以下单图多图视频理解3 SOTA，对标GPT-4V。
description_en: Focusing on end-side multi-modal large models, we launched the MiniCPM series of small steel cannon models to achieve efficient and low-cost end-side AI deployment with small and large capabilities.
why_matters_en: In 2025, it will receive another hundreds of millions of yuan in financing, and the download volume of the MiniCPM series will exceed 10 million. The 8B parameter model has won the single-image multi-image video understanding 3 SOTA below 20B, and benchmarked against GPT-4V.

name: OpenEvidence
description: 为医生提供AI医疗诊断平台的创业公司，已成独角兽。
why_matters: 1年内4轮融资，最新D轮$250M使估值达$120亿，Thrive Capital和DST领投，专注医疗AI医生助手。
description_en: A startup company that provides an AI medical diagnosis platform for doctors has become a unicorn.
why_matters_en: 4 rounds of financing in 1 year, the latest D round of $250M brings the valuation to $12 billion, led by Thrive Capital and DST, focusing on medical AI doctor assistants.

name: Sensesemi
description: 设计低功耗边缘AI芯片，集成传感器、信号处理和模拟AI推理，用于IoT、汽车和医疗设备。
why_matters: 种子轮融资270万美元，由Piper Serica领投，用于2026年首批测试芯片流片；针对电池供电设备实现多年续航的模拟AI推理。
description_en: Design low-power edge AI chips that integrate sensors, signal processing, and analog AI inference for IoT, automotive, and medical devices.
why_matters_en: Seed round financing of US$2.7 million, led by Piper Serica, will be used for the first batch of test chip tape-outs in 2026; to achieve simulated AI inference for battery-powered devices with multi-year battery life.

name: Lance
description: 酒店AI代理，处理客人请求如延住、预订餐厅，全程自动化连接遗留系统，支持多语言。
why_matters: YC W26支持，解决酒店业35年未解客人运营问题，已获Marriott、Hilton等客户采用，提供无缝多语言服务和追踪。
description_en: The hotel's AI agent handles guest requests such as extensions and restaurant reservations, automatically connects to legacy systems throughout the process, and supports multiple languages.
why_matters_en: Supported by YC W26, it solves 35 years of unsolved guest operation problems in the hotel industry. It has been adopted by customers such as Marriott and Hilton to provide seamless multi-language services and tracking.

name: Black Forest Labs
description: 德国初创公司开发Flux图像生成模型，提供高质量AI图像生成技术。
why_matters: 2025年12月获3亿美元B轮融资，估值达32.5亿美元，由Salesforce Ventures领投，NVIDIA参与，Flux模型成为领先开源图像生成技术。
description_en: A German startup develops the Flux image generation model to provide high-quality AI image generation technology.
why_matters_en: In December 2025, it received US$300 million in Series B financing with a valuation of US$3.25 billion. It was led by Salesforce Ventures and participated by NVIDIA. The Flux model became the leading open source image generation technology.

name: Helm.ai
description: 开发高级驾驶辅助系统、自动驾驶和机器人软件。
why_matters: 融资3000万美元，专注无监督深度学习自动驾驶技术，已获多家汽车行业认可。
description_en: Develops advanced driver assistance systems, autonomous driving and robotics software.
why_matters_en: It has raised US$30 million and focuses on unsupervised deep learning autonomous driving technology, which has been recognized by many automotive industries.

name: SKY ENGINE AI
description: 开发合成数据云平台，通过虚拟现实中的物理AI和深度学习加速计算机视觉模型训练。
why_matters: 获得Nvidia、Microsoft、Google核心ML总监背书，首个将合成数据与物理渲染结合的VR深度学习平台，适用于汽车、医疗、机器人等多行业。
description_en: Develop a synthetic data cloud platform to accelerate computer vision model training through physical AI and deep learning in virtual reality.
why_matters_en: Endorsed by the core ML directors of Nvidia, Microsoft, and Google, it is the first VR deep learning platform that combines synthetic data with physical rendering, and is suitable for many industries such as automobiles, medical care, and robotics.

name: Second Nature
description: 利用对话式AI模拟真实销售场景，提供销售、客服等专业培训的角色扮演平台，支持20+语言。
why_matters: 2025年10月完成2200万美元B轮融资，总额达3800万美元，由Sienna VC领投，Zoom等客户参与；服务Zoom、Oracle、Adobe等企业，员工仅30分钟培训即可提升销售超20%，快速扩展至客服和HR培训。
description_en: It uses conversational AI to simulate real sales scenarios and provides a role-playing platform for professional training in sales, customer service, etc., supporting 20+ languages.
why_matters_en: In October 2025, it completed a US$22 million Series B financing, totaling US$38 million, led by Sienna VC, with participation from customers such as Zoom; it serves companies such as Zoom, Oracle, and Adobe, and employees can increase sales by more than 20% with only 30 minutes of training, and quickly expanded to customer service and HR training.

name: KoreaDeepLearning
description: 非定型数据AI解决方案，解决企业AI導入难题。
why_matters: KDB产业银行追加投资至50亿韩元，系列A达120亿韩元，专注企业非定型数据处理痛点。
description_en: Non-standard data AI solution solves the problem of enterprise AI introduction.
why_matters_en: KDB Industrial Bank increased its investment to 5 billion won, with Series A reaching 12 billion won, focusing on the pain points of enterprise non-standard data processing.

name: RICE AI
description: 新加坡去中心化机器人AI平台，已售出800+迷你机器人，强调社区参与驱动机器人创新。
why_matters: 售出800+迷你机器人显示强劲社区牵引力，推动用户和构建者驱动的机器人创新模式。
description_en: Singapore's decentralized robot AI platform has sold 800+ mini robots, emphasizing community participation to drive robot innovation.
why_matters_en: 800+ mini robots sold show strong community traction, promoting a user- and builder-driven robot innovation model.

name: i10X
description: 新加坡统一AI平台，解决中小企业和个人用户AI工具订阅过多、选择困难的问题，提供一站式AI解决方案。
why_matters: 2025年Q4完成100万美元Pre-seed轮，Iterative、Antler AI Disrupt、PPR Ventures投资，定位解决AI工具'类别问题'而非功能问题。
description_en: Singapore's unified AI platform solves the problem of too many AI tool subscriptions and difficult choices for small and medium-sized enterprises and individual users, and provides one-stop AI solutions.
why_matters_en: It will complete a $1 million Pre-seed round in Q4 of 2025, with investments from Iterative, Antler AI Disrupt, and PPR Ventures. It is positioned to solve AI tool 'category problems' rather than functional problems.

name: Whisper
description: 旧金山公司开发使用深度学习技术放大感兴趣声音的助听器。
why_matters: 2轮融资2008万美元，深度学习助听器仅放大目标声音，针对听力障碍提供精准音频增强。
description_en: San Francisco company develops hearing aids that use deep learning technology to amplify sounds of interest.
why_matters_en: With 2 rounds of financing of US$20.08 million, the deep learning hearing aid only amplifies target sounds and provides precise audio enhancement for hearing impairment.

name: Vocci
description: AI智能戒指，可录音8小时并转录会议，支持112种语言，标记关键时刻生成摘要。
why_matters: CES 2026亮相赢得四项媒体奖，首创AI笔记戒指不同于健康追踪环，Halliday眼镜Kickstarter破330万美元记录，专注会议转录而非手机录音。
description_en: The AI ​​smart ring can record and transcribe meetings for 8 hours, supports 112 languages, and marks key moments to generate summaries.
why_matters_en: It debuted at CES 2026 and won four media awards. The first AI note-taking ring is different from the health tracking ring. The Kickstarter of Halliday glasses broke the record of 3.3 million US dollars. It focuses on meeting transcription rather than mobile phone recording.

name: Symbiotic Security
description: 专注使AI生成代码安全化的网络安全初创公司。
why_matters: 2026年1月独家报道完成1000万美元融资，针对AI代码安全痛点，填补欧洲AI安全领域空白。
description_en: A cybersecurity startup focused on making AI-generated code secure.
why_matters_en: In January 2026, it was exclusively reported that it had completed US$10 million in financing to address the pain points of AI code security and fill the gap in the European AI security field.

name: Level3AI
description: 新加坡AI初创公司，提供企业级AI代理用于语音、邮件和聊天全周期客户互动。
why_matters: Lightspeed领投1300万美元种子轮，已服务GetGo、Carousell等品牌，处理超1000万次互动，保证客户满意度否则全额退款，采用专有确定性AI架构。
description_en: A Singapore-based AI startup that provides enterprise-level AI agents for full-cycle customer interactions across voice, email and chat.
why_matters_en: Lightspeed led a US$13 million seed round and has served brands such as GetGo and Carousell. It has processed more than 10 million interactions and guarantees customer satisfaction or a full refund, using a proprietary deterministic AI architecture.

name: Hearvana
description: Hearvana是一家开发AI音频医疗可穿戴设备的初创公司，专注于听力健康领域。
why_matters: 2025年11月9日完成600万美元Pre-Seed轮融资，针对AI+音频+医疗可穿戴赛道，资金规模显著高于同类早期项目。
description_en: Hearvana is a start-up company developing AI audio medical wearable devices, focusing on the field of hearing health.
why_matters_en: On November 9, 2025, a $6 million Pre-Seed round of financing was completed. Targeting the AI+audio+medical wearable track, the funding scale is significantly higher than similar early-stage projects.

name: Ankar
description: AI驱动的专利操作系统,通过分析1.5亿+专利申请和2.5亿+科学论文,帮助企业和律师事务所加速专利生成、起草和保护流程
why_matters: 由Palantir前员工创立,Series A融资$2000万由Atomico领投;平台实现40%生产力提升,96%用户推荐率;首个统一端到端专利生命周期的AI操作系统,将24个月的专利流程压缩至数周;已获得L'Oréal、Valeo等企业客户
description_en: AI-driven patent operating system that helps companies and law firms accelerate the patent generation, drafting and protection process by analyzing 150 million+ patent applications and 250 million+ scientific papers
why_matters_en: Founded by former Palantir employees, Series A raised $20 million led by Atomico; the platform achieved a 40% productivity increase and a 96% user recommendation rate; the first AI operating system to unify the end-to-end patent life cycle, compressing the 24-month patent process to a few weeks; it has acquired corporate customers such as L'Oréal and Valeo

name: Apple AI Pin
description: 可穿戴AI芯片徽章，配备双摄像头和三个麦克风，可夹在衣服上，AirTag大小的圆形设计
why_matters: Apple加速开发以应对OpenAI竞争；预计2027年上市，首批2000万台；采用铝玻璃外壳、标准+广角双摄、物理按钮、Fitbit式充电条；代表AI硬件市场从手机向可穿戴设备的转变，但面临Humane AI失败的前车之鉴
description_en: Wearable AI chip badge, equipped with dual cameras and three microphones, can be clipped to clothing, AirTag-sized circular design
why_matters_en: Apple accelerates development to cope with OpenAI competition; it is expected to be launched in 2027, with the first batch of 20 million units; using aluminum glass casing, standard + wide-angle dual cameras, physical buttons, and Fitbit-style charging bars; it represents the transformation of the AI ​​hardware market from mobile phones to wearable devices, but it faces lessons from the failure of Humane AI

name: Lepro TB1
description: AI智能台灯搭载LightGPM 2.0系统，通过语音命令生成数十亿种照明场景。
why_matters: 基于色彩心理学和专业照明设计，实时解读用户意图自动调整灯光，支持音乐同步，是Agentic AI在家用场景的创新应用。
description_en: The AI ​​smart desk lamp is equipped with the LightGPM 2.0 system and generates billions of lighting scenes through voice commands.
why_matters_en: Based on color psychology and professional lighting design, it interprets user intentions in real time, automatically adjusts lighting, and supports music synchronization. It is an innovative application of Agentic AI in home scenarios.

name: Luma AI
description: AI视频生成平台，提供照片和视频创作模型，支持高质量内容生成
why_matters: 11月融资9亿美元，估值40亿美元，由Humain领投，参与方包括Andreessen Horowitz和AMD Ventures；融资规模在视频生成领域处于顶级水平，显示投资者对其技术的高度认可
description_en: AI video generation platform provides photo and video creation models and supports high-quality content generation
why_matters_en: It raised US$900 million in November with a valuation of US$4 billion, led by Humain, with participants including Andreessen Horowitz and AMD Ventures; the scale of financing is at the top level in the field of video generation, showing investors' high recognition of its technology

name: Breez AI
description: 无代码语音编排平台，让企业快速构建复杂语音AI交互系统。
why_matters: 美约双国籍初创获Wamda Capital领投130万美元前种子轮，专注无代码语音AI编排降低企业开发门槛。
description_en: The code-free voice orchestration platform allows enterprises to quickly build complex voice AI interaction systems.
why_matters_en: A US-Jordan dual-national startup received a $1.3 million pre-seed round led by Wamda Capital, focusing on code-free voice AI orchestration to lower the threshold for enterprise development.

name: Baseten
description: AI推理平台，帮助企业部署和管理大规模AI模型推理。
why_matters: Nvidia投资1.5亿美元，3亿美元融资后估值达50亿美元，专注AI推理基础设施满足模型部署需求。
description_en: The AI ​​inference platform helps enterprises deploy and manage large-scale AI model inference.
why_matters_en: Nvidia invested US$150 million, with a post-financing valuation of US$300 million reaching US$5 billion, focusing on AI inference infrastructure to meet model deployment needs.

name: Notta
description: 语音转文字AI软件平台，为企业提供高精度语音识别和转录解决方案
why_matters: 2025年12月完成$15M Series B融资，投资方包括Granite Asia和GSR Ventures；在日本AI初创企业中属于融资规模较大的语音AI产品，团队18人
description_en: Speech-to-text AI software platform provides enterprises with high-precision speech recognition and transcription solutions
why_matters_en: Completed $15M Series B financing in December 2025. Investors include Granite Asia and GSR Ventures; it is the largest funded voice AI product among Japanese AI start-ups, with a team of 18 people

name: Shaperon
description: 规制产业合规AI平台，为制药和医疗行业提供生成AI驱动的合规解决方案
why_matters: Series B融资7.3亿日元，累计融资12.3亿日元；首创规制产业AI合规平台，已在多家大型制药企业部署；生成AI处理实绩超100万件；投资方包括ALL STAR SAAS FUND、Vertex Ventures Japan等顶级基金
funding_total: $55M Series B (7.3亿円 equity 6.3亿円 + debt 1亿円)
description_en: Regulatory industry compliance AI platform, providing AI-driven compliance solutions for the pharmaceutical and medical industries
why_matters_en: Series B raised 730 million yen, with a total financing of 1.23 billion yen; the first AI compliance platform for regulated industries, which has been deployed in many large pharmaceutical companies; generated AI processing results of more than 1 million pieces; investors include top funds such as ALL STAR SAAS FUND and Vertex Ventures Japan

name: Airia
description: 企业AI安全和编排平台，使客户能够快速、安全地大规模部署AI，专为复杂和受监管环境设计
why_matters: 仅在15个月内从隐身模式发展到150名员工、5大洲、300+企业客户。专注于智能体生态系统中的漏洞减少，正好对应APAC地区86%组织采用混合AI方法的趋势
description_en: Enterprise AI security and orchestration platform that enables customers to quickly and securely deploy AI at scale, designed for complex and regulated environments
why_matters_en: Grow from stealth mode to 150 employees, 5 continents, and 300+ enterprise customers in just 15 months. Focusing on reducing vulnerabilities in the agent ecosystem coincides with the trend of 86% of organizations in the APAC region adopting a hybrid AI approach

name: ELSA Speak
description: 利用语音识别AI帮助东南亚7亿人学习英语的创新教育产品。
why_matters: 累计融资6000万美元，全球下载量超5000万，是越南AI教育领域的领军者，专注语音AI技术。
description_en: An innovative educational product that uses speech recognition AI to help 700 million people in Southeast Asia learn English.
why_matters_en: It has raised a total of US$60 million in financing and has been downloaded more than 50 million times globally. It is a leader in the field of AI education in Vietnam, focusing on voice AI technology.

name: Ignition AI Accelerator
description: 东南亚首个全球AI创业加速器，由NVIDIA、Tribe和新加坡数字产业局合作运营，为早期至成长阶段AI初创企业提供技术指导、云计算资源和融资机会
why_matters: 东南亚首创专业AI加速器项目，由NVIDIA和新加坡政府支持，2024年5月启动，已与Pfizer、Aptos Foundation等行业巨头建立合作伙伴关系，2026年计划招募15家高潜力AI初创企业，提供为期一年的深度技术指导和全球市场准入支持
description_en: Southeast Asia's first global AI startup accelerator, jointly operated by NVIDIA, Tribe and the Singapore Digital Industry Agency, provides technical guidance, cloud computing resources and financing opportunities to early to growth stage AI startups.
why_matters_en: Southeast Asia's first professional AI accelerator project, supported by NVIDIA and the Singapore government, will be launched in May 2024. It has established partnerships with industry giants such as Pfizer and Aptos Foundation. In 2026, it plans to recruit 15 high-potential AI start-ups and provide one-year in-depth technical guidance and global market access support.

name: Iconic
description: 专注于游戏领域的设备端AI推理平台，支持互动格式创新。
why_matters: 2025年12月获1300万美元种子轮（约1100万欧元），Google AI Futures Fund参与，用于将设备端AI系统推向生产并扩展游戏工作室合作。
description_en: A device-side AI inference platform focusing on the gaming field, supporting innovation in interactive formats.
why_matters_en: In December 2025, it received a US$13 million seed round (approximately 11 million euros), with the participation of Google AI Futures Fund, which will be used to push the device-side AI system to production and expand game studio cooperation.

name: Glean
description: 企业AI搜索平台，$1.5亿融资估值$72.5亿
why_matters: Wellington Management领投$1.5亿Series F，估值达$72.5亿；企业搜索和NLP应用融资最多的初创企业，Sequoia、Lightspeed等持续加码；展现企业AI基础设施商业化成熟度
description_en: Glean is an enterprise AI search platform, with $150M funding and a $7.25B valuation.
why_matters_en: Wellington Management led a $150M Series F, with valuation reaching $7.25B. It is one of the most funded enterprise search and NLP application startups, with continued backing from Sequoia and Lightspeed, showing mature commercialization of enterprise AI infrastructure.

name: Moon Surgical
description: 开发腹腔镜手术机器人系统，增强手术精准度并提高手术室效率
why_matters: 融资€83.3M用于开发Maestro手术系统；专注微创手术机器人化，扩大微创手术可及性，填补欧洲手术机器人市场空白
description_en: Develop a laparoscopic surgical robotic system to enhance surgical precision and improve operating room efficiency
why_matters_en: Financing €83.3M will be used to develop the Maestro surgical system; focus on the roboticization of minimally invasive surgery, expand the accessibility of minimally invasive surgery, and fill the gap in the European surgical robot market

name: NEURA Robotics
description: 开发具有集成AI、传感器和直观界面的认知机器人助手，用于工业和日常应用
why_matters: 融资€148.67M在欧洲机器人初创企业中排名前列；开发MAiRA、MAV、LARA、MiPA等多款认知机器人产品，首创将AI与物理机器人深度融合用于日常生活场景
description_en: Develop cognitive robotic assistants with integrated AI, sensors and intuitive interfaces for industrial and everyday applications
why_matters_en: Financing €148.67M, ranking among the top among European robot start-ups; developing multiple cognitive robot products such as MAiRA, MAV, LARA, MiPA, etc., and pioneering the deep integration of AI and physical robots in daily life scenarios

name: Cyberdyne
description: 开发机器人外骨骼HAL和医疗机器人系统，融合人、机器人、AI和信息技术
why_matters: 2004年由筑波大学教授山海嘉之创立，HAL机器人外骨骼是全球首创医疗机器人，融合"赛博尼克斯"技术（人-机器人-AI-信息融合），在物理AI时代具有独特竞争力
description_en: Develop robotic exoskeleton HAL and medical robot systems that integrate humans, robots, AI and information technology
why_matters_en: Founded in 2004 by Professor Yoshiyuki Yamakai of the University of Tsukuba, the HAL robot exoskeleton is the world's first medical robot. It integrates "Cybernix" technology (human-robot-AI-information fusion) and has unique competitiveness in the era of physical AI.

name: NeoSapien
description: 可穿戴AI伴侣设备，提供始终在线的个人AI助手功能
why_matters: 2025年12月完成200万美元种子轮融资；处于早期产品市场契合阶段，已发货首款消费设备；代表消费者对始终在线个人AI设备的强劲需求，融资用于加速产品开发和可穿戴设备路线图扩展
description_en: Wearable AI companion device, providing always-on personal AI assistant function
why_matters_en: Completed US$2 million in seed round financing in December 2025; in early product market fit stage, has shipped its first consumer device; represents strong consumer demand for always-on personal AI devices, and financing will be used to accelerate product development and wearable device roadmap expansion

name: Oxitone Medical
description: 为慢性复杂疾病患者提供连续远程护理的数字健康穿戴设备。
why_matters: 总融资$10.5M，跨越5轮融资，包括最近$1M可转换票据，由连续创业者创立，专注严重慢性病远程监测。
description_en: Digital health wearables that provide continuous remote care for patients with chronic complex diseases.
why_matters_en: Total financing is $10.5M, spanning 5 rounds of financing, including the recent $1M convertible note. It was founded by a serial entrepreneur and focuses on remote monitoring of serious chronic diseases.

name: Vellum
description: Y Combinator W23批次的AI开发者平台，帮助软件开发者使用GPT-4等大语言模型快速构建AI应用
why_matters: Y Combinator W23批次55家生成式AI初创公司之一；由Noa Flaherty、Sidd Seethepalli和Akash Sharma共同创立；在YC批次期间已推出6项功能；专注于简化LLM应用开发流程，降低开发者门槛；代表开发者工具类AI应用的新方向
description_en: Y Combinator W23 batch AI developer platform helps software developers quickly build AI applications using large language models such as GPT-4
why_matters_en: One of the 55 generative AI startups in the Y Combinator W23 batch; co-founded by Noa Flaherty, Sidd Seethepalli and Akash Sharma; has launched 6 features during the YC batch; focuses on simplifying the LLM application development process and lowering the developer threshold; represents a new direction for developer tool AI applications

name: Augmentus
description: 新加坡无代码机器人平台，通过简化工业机器人开发和部署流程降低实施成本和技能门槛
why_matters: 首个无代码、完全集成的工业机器人平台，使无机器人培训背景的人员能在数分钟内开发、部署和重新配置机器人系统，由多国公司机器人团队领导者共同创立
description_en: Singapore's code-free robot platform reduces implementation costs and skill barriers by simplifying the industrial robot development and deployment process
why_matters_en: The first code-free, fully integrated industrial robotics platform that enables people without robotics training background to develop, deploy and reconfigure robotic systems in minutes, co-founded by robotics team leaders from multinational companies

name: Lexroom.ai
description: AI法律科技平台，为企业提供智能合同管理和法律服务。
why_matters: 2025年9月完成1620万欧元A轮，总融资1850万欧元，由View Different等投资，意大利AI法律领域领军者，快速吸引顶级VC。
description_en: The AI ​​legal technology platform provides enterprises with smart contract management and legal services.
why_matters_en: In September 2025, it completed a €16.2 million Series A round with a total financing of €18.5 million, invested by View Different and others. It is a leader in the Italian AI legal field and has quickly attracted top VCs.

name: Synthesized
description: AI驱动的合成数据平台和测试基础设施，优化企业软件开发流程。
why_matters: 2025年9月完成1700万欧元A轮，由Redalpine领投，总融资1950万欧元，专注AI时代软件测试自动化，具有企业级应用潜力。
description_en: AI-driven synthetic data platform and testing infrastructure to optimize enterprise software development processes.
why_matters_en: In September 2025, it completed a 17 million euro A round, led by Redalpine, with a total financing of 19.5 million euros. It focuses on software test automation in the AI ​​era and has enterprise-level application potential.

name: Light
description: AI原生金融平台，取代传统遗留系统，提供智能财务管理服务。
why_matters: 2025年9月完成2560万欧元A轮，由Balderton Capital领投，总融资3700万欧元，用于纽约扩张和工程团队扩充，专注AI金融基础设施。
description_en: The AI-native financial platform replaces traditional legacy systems and provides intelligent financial management services.
why_matters_en: In September 2025, a 25.6 million euro Series A round was completed, led by Balderton Capital, with a total financing of 37 million euros, which will be used for expansion in New York and engineering team expansion, focusing on AI financial infrastructure.

name: Nansen
description: 新加坡区块链分析AI平台，融资8820万美元，来自44个投资者
why_matters: 新加坡融资规模最大的AI初创企业之一，融资8820万美元，2022年收购Ape Board，展现强劲融资能力和并购战略
source: Top Singapore Startups That Bloomed in 2023
description_en: Singapore’s blockchain analytics AI platform raises US$88.2 million from 44 investors
why_matters_en: One of the largest AI startups in Singapore with financing of US$88.2 million, it will acquire Ape Board in 2022, demonstrating its strong financing capabilities and M&A strategy.

name: MagicPod
description: 云端自动化测试服务平台，利用AI技术简化软件测试流程
why_matters: 2025年4月完成400万美元Series B融资。专注于AI驱动的测试自动化，为开发团队提高效率。融资方包括Incubate Fund等知名投资机构。代表日本AI在开发工具领域的应用。
description_en: Cloud automated testing service platform uses AI technology to simplify the software testing process
why_matters_en: Completed Series B financing of US$4 million in April 2025. Focus on AI-driven test automation to improve efficiency for development teams. Financiers include well-known investment institutions such as Incubate Fund. Represents the application of Japanese AI in the field of development tools.

name: Zen Intelligence
description: 开发自主软件机器人和数据分析解决方案的AI公司，专注于流程自动化
why_matters: 2025年9月完成1000万美元Series A融资。专注于自主软件机器人技术，融资方包括Z Venture Capital等。在日本AI和机器人领域快速增长的初创公司中具有代表性。
description_en: AI company developing autonomous software robots and data analysis solutions, focusing on process automation
why_matters_en: Completed Series A financing of US$10 million in September 2025. Focusing on autonomous software robotics technology, financing sources include Z Venture Capital and others. Representative among rapidly growing startups in Japan's AI and robotics fields.

name: Motion G
description: 利用生成式AI提供工程解决方案的创新初创公司。
why_matters: 2023年两轮早期融资累计3100万美元，专注生成式AI工程应用，在新加坡深科技领域表现突出。
description_en: Innovative startups leveraging generative AI to provide engineering solutions.
why_matters_en: Two rounds of early-stage financing in 2023 totaled US$31 million, focusing on generative AI engineering applications and outstanding performance in Singapore's deep technology field.

name: HPC-AI Technology
description: 新加坡AI模型解决方案领导者，提供高性能计算AI基础设施服务。
why_matters: 2023年完成2200万美元A轮融资，成为新加坡AI深科技领域领先企业，专注AI模型解决方案填补高性能计算基础设施空白。
description_en: A leader in AI model solutions in Singapore, providing high-performance computing AI infrastructure services.
why_matters_en: It will complete Series A financing of US$22 million in 2023 and become a leading company in Singapore's AI deep technology field, focusing on AI model solutions to fill the gap in high-performance computing infrastructure.

name: Chamber
description: AI基础设施优化平台，通过智能编排和资源优化使企业在现有硬件基础上平均运行50%更多工作负载
why_matters: 由Amazon前基础设施优化团队创立，解决行业$2400亿年度浪费问题。通过智能GPU优化和实时资源重新分配，帮助企业在不增加硬件的情况下提升50%工作负载容量。创始人Charles为二次创业者，团队在Amazon交付数亿美元成本节省经验。
description_en: The AI ​​infrastructure optimization platform enables enterprises to run an average of 50% more workloads on existing hardware through intelligent orchestration and resource optimization.
why_matters_en: Founded by Amazon's former infrastructure optimization team to solve the industry's $240 billion annual waste problem. Through intelligent GPU optimization and real-time resource reallocation, it helps enterprises increase workload capacity by 50% without adding hardware. The founder, Charles, is a second-time entrepreneur, and his team has delivered hundreds of millions of dollars in cost savings at Amazon.

name: White Rabbit 3-in-1 AI Companion
description: 天花板安装的AI驱动智能家居设备，集成360度安全摄像头、动态照明和智能扬声器，具有AI运动追踪和手势控制功能
why_matters: 融资目标仅$2,000，实际融资$74,728超目标37倍；独特的AI运动追踪和自适应照明系统首次将计算机视觉技术应用于家居照明，16,000流明亮度支持专业级应用；67位支持者在17天内完成融资，显示强劲社区需求
description_en: Ceiling-mounted AI-powered smart home device integrating 360-degree security cameras, dynamic lighting and smart speakers with AI motion tracking and gesture control
why_matters_en: The financing target was only $2,000, and the actual financing of $74,728 exceeded the target by 37 times; the unique AI motion tracking and adaptive lighting system applies computer vision technology to home lighting for the first time, with 16,000 lumens of brightness supporting professional applications; 67 backers completed financing within 17 days, showing strong community demand

name: RISA Labs
description: RISA Labs 开发肿瘤学AI操作系统，自动化患者访问、福利验证和预授权流程。
why_matters: 2026年1月完成1110万美元A轮融资，由Cencora Ventures和Optum Ventures领投，已在美国最大肿瘤诊所上线，行政时间节省80%，拒绝率降40%，首次通过率达97.8%，授权时间从8天降至24小时内。
description_en: RISA Labs develops oncology AI operating system to automate patient access, benefits verification and pre-authorization processes.
why_matters_en: It completed a $11.1 million Series A round of financing in January 2026, led by Cencora Ventures and Optum Ventures. It has been launched in the largest oncology clinic in the United States, saving 80% of administrative time, reducing the rejection rate by 40%, the first-time pass rate reaching 97.8%, and the authorization time reduced from 8 days to within 24 hours.

name: Kardi AI
description: 利用AI进行长期EKG监测，实现预防性心脏健康护理和早期心律不齐检测的远程医疗工具。
why_matters: 2023年11月完成€1.5M种子轮融资，总额达€1.9M，由医生Tomáš Skála等创立，提供AI驱动的心脏监测服务，针对慢性病远程护理市场。
description_en: A telemedicine tool that leverages AI for long-term EKG monitoring, preventive heart health care and early arrhythmia detection.
why_matters_en: In November 2023, it completed a €1.5M seed round of financing, with a total amount of €1.9M. Founded by doctor Tomáš Skála and others, it provides AI-driven heart monitoring services and targets the chronic disease remote care market.

name: Isomorphic Labs
description: AI药物发现平台，使用深度学习加速生物制药研发流程
why_matters: €523M融资规模创AI药物发现领域纪录；DeepMind支持背景；AI+生物制药垂直应用代表，解决€7T制药产业核心痛点
description_en: AI drug discovery platform, using deep learning to accelerate biopharmaceutical R&D process
why_matters_en: The financing scale of €523M sets a record in the field of AI drug discovery; DeepMind support background; AI+ biopharmaceutical vertical application representative, solving the core pain points of the pharmaceutical industry of €7T

name: Even Realities
description: Even G2智能眼镜，集成AI功能如仪表盘、提词器和通知，支持空间计算与日常佩戴。
why_matters: 推出Even G2新款AI眼镜，结合空间计算与隐形技术，用户案例显示用于演讲、会议和语言学习，提供自然交互体验。
description_en: Even G2 smart glasses integrate AI functions such as dashboards, teleprompters and notifications, and support spatial computing and daily wear.
why_matters_en: Launched the new Even G2 AI glasses, which combine spatial computing and invisible technology. User cases show that they are used for speeches, meetings and language learning, providing a natural interactive experience.

name: Halliday
description: 全球首款主动式AI眼镜，内置隐藏近眼显示屏，提供实时智能信息支持，轻巧舒适。
why_matters: CES 2025最受欢迎AI/AR眼镜，获ZDNET、CNET、The Verge等媒体报道，在Kickstarter/Indiegogo众筹获巨大社区支持，首创隐形显示+触控环创新设计。
description_en: The world's first active AI glasses, with built-in hidden near-eye display, provide real-time intelligent information support, are lightweight and comfortable.
why_matters_en: The most popular AI/AR glasses at CES 2025 have been reported by ZDNET, CNET, The Verge and other media. They have received huge community support in Kickstarter/Indiegogo and are the first innovative design of invisible display + touch ring.

name: Sandbar Stream Ring
description: 由前Meta工程师创立的$249 AI智能戒指，支持触控录音和AI交互，提供免费版和$10/月订阅版
why_matters: 前Meta神经接口工程师创办，2025年11月发布Stream Ring。$249定价，提供免费层级（限制AI交互）和Stream Pro订阅（$10/月，无限对话+功能抢先体验）。预计2026年夏季发货。与Pebble Index 01竞争同一市场但商业模式不同——采用订阅制而非一次性购买。代表AI硬件从健康追踪向语音笔记转变的新方向
description_en: The $249 AI smart ring founded by a former Meta engineer supports touch recording and AI interaction. It offers a free version and a $10/month subscription version.
why_matters_en: Founded by former Meta neural interface engineers, Stream Ring will be released in November 2025. Pricing is $249, offering free tier (limited AI interaction) and Stream Pro subscription ($10/month, unlimited conversations + early access to features). Shipping is expected in summer 2026. Competing in the same market as Pebble Index 01 but with a different business model - a subscription system rather than a one-time purchase. Represents a new direction in the transformation of AI hardware from health tracking to voice notes

name: Pebble Index 01
description: 一款$75智能戒指，通过按钮录音捕捉转瞬即逝的想法，支持本地语音转文字和100+语言
why_matters: Pebble创始人Eric Migicovsky重启品牌后的首款AI硬件产品。采用极简主义设计（仅按钮+麦克风），无需充电（电池续航2年），无订阅费用。与竞品Stream Ring（$249+$10/月）形成鲜明对比。本地运行语音转文字，隐私优先架构，所有数据存储在手机而非云端。预订价$75，3月2026年发货，已有25000+预订量（Pebble Time 2智能表）。创始人自用3个月，日均使用10-20次，代表硬件创业新思路——从盈利而非融资出发的自主可持续模式
description_en: A $75 smart ring that captures fleeting thoughts through button recording, supports local speech-to-text and 100+ languages
why_matters_en: The first AI hardware product after Pebble founder Eric Migicovsky restarted the brand. Featuring a minimalist design (buttons + microphone only), no need to charge (battery life 2 years), no subscription fees. In stark contrast to competing product Stream Ring ($249+$10/month). Locally runs speech-to-text, privacy-first architecture, and all data is stored on the phone rather than in the cloud. The pre-order price is $75, and it will be shipped in March 2026. There are already 25,000+ pre-orders (Pebble Time 2 smart watch). The founder used it for his own use for 3 months and used it 10-20 times a day on average. It represents a new idea for hardware entrepreneurship - an independent and sustainable model based on profit rather than financing.

name: Mercor
description: AI人才与项目匹配平台，优化训练数据和自由职业者市场。
why_matters: 2025年报告年化收入4.5亿美元，估值约100亿美元，解决AI生态人才瓶颈的人机桥接平台。
description_en: AI talent and project matching platform, optimizing training data and freelance market.
why_matters_en: In 2025, it will report annual revenue of US$450 million and a valuation of approximately US$10 billion. It is a human-machine bridging platform that solves the talent bottleneck in the AI ​​ecosystem.

name: Heven Aerotech
description: 开发氢动力无人机的AI相关硬件初创公司。
why_matters: 2019年创办，2025年12月1亿美元B轮后达10亿美元估值，总融资1.152亿美元。
description_en: AI-related hardware startup developing hydrogen-powered drones.
why_matters_en: Founded in 2019, it reached a valuation of US$1 billion after a US$100 million Series B round in December 2025, with a total financing of US$115.2 million.

name: Bioptimus
description: 巴黎生物科技公司，开发生物学基础模型AI。
why_matters: €41M Series A，生物基础模型创新，生物科技高价值投资代表。
description_en: A Paris biotech company that develops biologically based model AI.
why_matters_en: €41M Series A, innovation in biological basic models, representative of high-value investment in biotechnology.

name: Appier Group
description: 日本最大的人工智能公司通过基于人工智能的SaaS业务提供销售和营销支持
why_matters: 2012年创业，日本AI企业销售额排名第1，达340亿5,700万日元。以“AI民主化”为愿景，提供实施了高级预测AI的营销解决方案。解决潜在用户预测、获取、购买促进等企业课题。通过全球拓展拥有海量数据和压倒性的技术实力。
funding_total: 上場企業（売上高340億5,700万円）
description_en: Japan's largest AI company providing sales and marketing support through AI-based SaaS business
why_matters_en: Founded in 2012, No. 1 in Japan's AI company sales ranking with sales of 34,057 million yen. We provide marketing solutions that implement advanced predictive AI with the vision of "democratizing AI." Solving corporate issues such as predicting potential users, acquiring them, and promoting purchases. Possesses vast amounts of data and overwhelming technological capabilities through global expansion.

name: Soliman Ring
description: 全球首款AI代理戒指，集成ChatGPT实时聊天和自定义AI头像，时尚智能穿戴。
why_matters: 自称世界首款AI代理戒指，支持ChatGPT LIVE延长连接，高需求导致交付延迟，已吸引400k感兴趣用户。
description_en: The world's first AI agent ring integrates ChatGPT real-time chat and customized AI avatar, making it a fashionable and smart wearable.
why_matters_en: Claiming to be the world's first AI proxy ring, it supports ChatGPT LIVE extended connection. High demand has caused delivery delays and has attracted 400k interested users.

name: Celestial AI
description: AI基础设施公司，开发高效能AI芯片和计算平台
why_matters: $250M Series C融资（2025年3月）、估值$2.5B，由Fidelity领投，投资方包括Tiger Global、BlackRock和Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan。融资规模和投资者阵容体现对AI芯片基础设施的强劲市场需求
description_en: AI infrastructure company, developing high-performance AI chips and computing platforms
why_matters_en: $250M Series C financing (March 2025), valuation $2.5B, led by Fidelity, investors include Tiger Global, BlackRock and Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan. Financing scale and investor lineup reflect strong market demand for AI chip infrastructure

name: Modular
description: AI基础设施公司，开发高性能AI编译和部署平台
why_matters: $250M融资轮（2025年9月）由US Innovative Technology Fund领投，参与方包括GV、Greylock和General Catalyst。融资规模在2025年AI初创融资中排名前列，体现对AI基础设施层的持续投资热情
description_en: AI infrastructure company that develops high-performance AI compilation and deployment platforms
why_matters_en: The $250M financing round (September 2025) was led by US Innovative Technology Fund, with participants including GV, Greylock and General Catalyst. The scale of financing ranks among the top among AI start-up financings in 2025, reflecting continued enthusiasm for investment in the AI ​​infrastructure layer.

name: NeuReality
description: 通过面向AI推理的NAPU与软件相结合的下一代半导体解决方案，提高云和边缘AI的效率。
why_matters: 总融资$59.65M，获SK Hynix、Samsung Ventures投资，提供AI基础设施aaS，低成本解决现有基础设施的AI扩展难题。
description_en: Streamline cloud and edge AI with next-generation semiconductor solutions that combine NAPU and software for AI interference.
why_matters_en: Total funding of $59.65M, SK Hynix and Samsung Ventures invested to provide AI infrastructure AaS and solve AI expansion issues for existing infrastructure at a low cost.

name: SeeQC
description: 利用单磁通量子（SFQ）芯片重现量子计算系统的高能效硬件。
why_matters: 2025年1月获得$30M Series A融资，通过量子计算芯片实现可扩展性和节能，开拓下一代计算市场。
description_en: Energy-efficient hardware that recreates quantum computing systems with single-flux quantum (SFQ) chips.
why_matters_en: Procured $30M Series A in January 2025, achieved scalability and energy savings by implementing quantum computing chips, and pioneered the next-generation computing market.

name: AppliedAI
description: 为保险行业开发AI解决方案，自动化承保和理赔处理，处理时间减少87%。
why_matters: H1 2025欧洲AI Series A最大一轮€55M，针对保险行业自动化核心流程，实现处理时间87%大幅缩短，产品市场契合度高。
description_en: Develop AI solutions for the insurance industry to automate underwriting and claims processing, reducing processing time by 87%.
why_matters_en: H1 2025 European AI Series A has a maximum round of €55M. It is aimed at automating core processes in the insurance industry, achieving a significant reduction in processing time by 87%, and has a high degree of product market fit.

name: Konux
description: 铁路行业AI运维自动化平台，基于机器学习和物联网提供预测性维护和运营优化解决方案
why_matters: 工业AI垂直应用领导者，融资3.76亿美元，专注于铁路运维自动化这一高价值细分市场，融资规模在德国AI初创中排名前列，代表深度技术商业化成功案例
description_en: AI operation and maintenance automation platform for the railway industry, providing predictive maintenance and operation optimization solutions based on machine learning and the Internet of Things
why_matters_en: A leader in industrial AI vertical applications, it has raised US$376 million, focusing on the high-value market segment of railway operation and maintenance automation. Its financing scale ranks among the top among German AI start-ups, and represents a successful case of deep technology commercialization.

name: Helsing
description: 防御科技AI公司，为国防和安全应用开发AI解决方案，融资规模达14亿欧元
why_matters: 德国AI初创融资最高纪录保持者，14亿欧元融资规模超越所有同行，代表欧洲防御科技AI的战略地位，获得政府和顶级VC支持
description_en: Defense Technology AI company, which develops AI solutions for defense and security applications, has raised €1.4 billion in financing
why_matters_en: The record holder for the highest amount of AI start-up financing in Germany. The financing scale of 1.4 billion euros exceeds all peers. It represents the strategic position of European defense technology AI and has received support from the government and top VCs.

name: Aikido Security
description: 比利时网络安全初创公司，提供AI驱动的安全解决方案。
why_matters: 2026年初以10亿美元估值完成6000万美元融资，成为独角兽，早期阶段即实现快速增长突破。
description_en: Belgian cybersecurity startup providing AI-driven security solutions.
why_matters_en: In early 2026, it completed US$60 million in financing at a valuation of US$1 billion, becoming a unicorn and achieving rapid growth breakthroughs in the early stages.

name: ADVANCE.AI
description: 专注于金融科技领域的AI解决方案提供商，提供eKYC和反欺诈系统，帮助企业实现数字化转型和风险管理。
why_matters: 成立于2016年，在东南亚市场eKYC和反欺诈系统获得显著 traction，是区域内首个专注于AI驱动客户 onboarding 和运营效率的领先提供商。
description_en: An AI solution provider focusing on the financial technology field, providing eKYC and anti-fraud systems to help enterprises achieve digital transformation and risk management.
why_matters_en: Founded in 2016, eKYC and anti-fraud systems have gained significant traction in the Southeast Asian market and are the first leading provider in the region focusing on AI-driven customer onboarding and operational efficiency.

name: Biolinq
description: 可穿戴生物传感器，实时监测皮肤下的葡萄糖水平
why_matters: 2025年3月融资$100M，专注连续葡萄糖监测的可穿戴医疗设备，代表医疗级可穿戴设备融资热潮
description_en: Wearable biosensor monitors glucose levels under skin in real time
why_matters_en: Raised $100M in March 2025, focusing on wearable medical devices for continuous glucose monitoring, representing a boom in financing for medical-grade wearable devices

name: Oura
description: 智能戒指平台，通过可穿戴设备收集数十项个人健康和健康指标数据
why_matters: 2025年融资$900M创数字健康历史最大单笔融资纪录（自2011年起），估值$11B；销售额预计2025年达$10亿；智能戒指市场份额从46%增至75%，消费者34岁以下人群渗透率翻倍；已售出550万枚戒指，其中超50%在过去一年内售出
description_en: Smart ring platform that collects dozens of personal health and fitness indicator data through wearable devices
why_matters_en: In 2025, it raised $900M, setting a record for the largest single financing in the history of digital health (since 2011), with a valuation of $11B; sales are expected to reach $1 billion in 2025; the smart ring market share increased from 46% to 75%, and the penetration rate of consumers under the age of 34 doubled; 5.5 million rings have been sold, of which more than 50% were sold in the past year

name: Humans&
description: 专注人类中心AI，增强人类协作而非替代的初创公司。
why_matters: 成立仅3个月获Nvidia和Jeff Bezos领投4.8亿美元种子轮，估值44.8亿美元，Anthropic/xAI/Google校友创办，人类增强AI新范式。
description_en: A start-up company focusing on human-centered AI to enhance human collaboration rather than replace it.
why_matters_en: Only 3 months after its establishment, it received a US$480 million seed round led by Nvidia and Jeff Bezos, with a valuation of US$4.48 billion. Founded by Anthropic/xAI/Google alumni, it is a new paradigm of human-augmented AI.

name: Nuna Pendant
description: 299美元AI项链，使用传感器和AI分析生物、环境和语音信号，提供情绪健康洞察。
why_matters: 香港中文大学AIoT实验室衍生项目，首创追踪情绪健康的AI可穿戴，超越健身追踪范畴。
description_en: The $299 AI necklace uses sensors and AI to analyze biological, environmental and voice signals to provide emotional health insights.
why_matters_en: A spin-off project from the AIoT Laboratory of the Chinese University of Hong Kong, it is the first AI wearable to track emotional health, going beyond fitness tracking.

name: Rembrand
description: Rembrand利用生成式AI分析视频帧，在YouTube和TikTok内容中无缝插入虚拟产品植入，实现动态品牌广告。
why_matters: 2025年1月完成super{set}领投的2300万美元A轮，总融资3100万美元，2024年付费观看量达2.5亿次，预计2025年达数十亿次，收入2023-2024年增长6倍，是首个将虚拟产品植入扩展至CTV的专业平台。
description_en: Rembrand uses generative AI to analyze video frames to seamlessly insert virtual product placements into YouTube and TikTok content to achieve dynamic brand advertising.
why_matters_en: In January 2025, it completed a $23 million Series A round led by super{set}, with a total financing of $31 million. The paid viewing volume will reach 250 million times in 2024, and is expected to reach billions in 2025. The revenue will increase 6 times from 2023 to 2024. It is the first professional platform to extend virtual product implantation to CTV.

name: Sakana AI
description: 一家源自日本、受自然启发的基座模型开发公司。推动包括 AI 科学家在内的创新研发。
why_matters: 由 Transformer 论文作者 Llion Jones 和 Google Brain 东京负责人 David Ha 创立。在 A 轮融资中筹集 200M 美元，随后追加 135M 美元，总计 479M 美元。获得日本大型银行（MUFG、SMBC、瑞穗）和主要企业（NEC、富士通、KDDI 等）的战略投资。通过仿生 AI 和“AI 科学家”（研发流程自动化）实现了行业首创的技术。被定位为日本主导的 Sovereign AI 构想的核心企业，并获得 NVIDIA、NEA、Khosla Ventures 等顶级 VC 的支持。
description_en: A foundation model development company inspired by nature from Japan. Promoting innovative research and development including AI scientists
why_matters_en: Founded by Llion Jones, author of the Transformer paper, and David Ha, head of Google Brain in Tokyo. Raised $200M in Series A, then raised an additional $135M for a total of $479M. Obtained strategic investments from major Japanese banks (MUFG, SMBC, Mizuho) and major corporations (NEC, Fujitsu, KDDI, etc.). Realizing the industry's first technology with biomimetic AI and "AI Scientist" (research and development process automation). Positioned as a core company of the Japan-led Sovereign AI initiative and supported by top-tier VCs such as NVIDIA, NEA, and Khosla Ventures

why_matters: 2024年创立即获€102百万融资，快速扩展至伦敦和纽约，集成Word将文档转为交互网格，提升法律工作效率。
description_en: Stockholm LegalTech platform uses AI to assist in legal document review, research and drafting.
why_matters_en: Founded in 2024, it received €102 million in financing and quickly expanded to London and New York. It integrated Word to turn documents into interactive grids to improve legal work efficiency.

name: Samsung Ballie
description: 三星家庭AI机器人，内置投影仪，可自主巡逻并管理智能家居。

hardware_specs.features: 智能家居控制/视频通话/投影

why_matters: 三星CES 2025重磅发布，内置投影仪可在任意表面显示，AI管家+智能家居中枢
description_en: Samsung's home AI robot has a built-in projector and can autonomously patrol and manage smart homes.
why_matters_en: Samsung’s big release at CES 2025 is a built-in projector that can be displayed on any surface, AI butler + smart home hub
latest_news_en: 2025-01: CES 2025 officially releases the mass production version

name: Limitless Pendant
description: AI录音吊坠，前Rewind团队打造，自动录音并生成会议摘要和记忆回顾。
why_matters: 前Rewind团队打造，$99极致性价比，100小时续航，CES 2025获评最佳可穿戴设备
description_en: The AI ​​recording pendant, built by the former Rewind team, automatically records and generates meeting summaries and memory reviews.
why_matters_en: Built by the former Rewind team, it is extremely cost-effective at $99 and has 100 hours of battery life. It was named the best wearable device at CES 2025.

name: Rabbit R1
description: 革命性掌上AI助手，搭载LAM（大行动模型）直接操作App，无需API集成即可完成各种任务。
why_matters: CES 2024 最佳创新奖，预售10万台售罄，LAM模型革新App交互方式，$199定价亲民
latest_news: 2025-01: 量产版发货，用户评价两极分化
description_en: The revolutionary handheld AI assistant is equipped with LAM (Large Action Model) to directly operate the App and complete various tasks without API integration.
why_matters_en: CES 2024 Best Innovation Award, 100,000 pre-sale units sold out, LAM model revolutionizes app interaction, affordable price of $199
latest_news_en: 2025-01: Mass production version shipped, user reviews are polarizing

name: Braveheart Bio
description: AI驱动药物发现，专注严重心脏病突破性治疗。
why_matters: 1.85亿美元A轮，为近期最大生物科技首轮融资之一，AI将药物发现周期从数年压缩至数月。
description_en: AI-driven drug discovery focuses on breakthrough treatments for severe heart disease.
why_matters_en: The US$185 million Series A is one of the largest first-round financing rounds for biotechnology in recent times. AI has compressed the drug discovery cycle from years to months.

name: Tsavorite Scalable Intelligence
description: 统一CPU/GPU/内存/连接的Omni Processing Unit (OPU)的初创公司。
why_matters: Omni Processing Unit统一多种计算，明年发布Helix AI设备，已获超1亿美元预订单，包括Fortune 500和主权云提供商。
description_en: A startup that unifies the Omni Processing Unit (OPU) of CPU/GPU/memory/connectivity.
why_matters_en: Omni Processing Unit unifies multiple types of computing and will release the Helix AI device next year. It has already received over $100 million in pre-orders, including Fortune 500 and sovereign cloud providers.

name: NextSilicon
description: AI芯片和RISC-V CPU核心，无需代码修改即可10倍性能提升的初创公司。
why_matters: Maverick-2 AI芯片Q4量产，复杂工作负载比领先GPU性能高10倍、功耗低60%；Arbel RISC-V核心超越Intel Lion Cove和AMD Zen 5。
description_en: AI chip and RISC-V CPU core, a startup that can improve performance 10 times without code modification.
why_matters_en: Maverick-2 AI chip Q4 is in mass production, with complex workload performance 10 times higher than that of leading GPUs and 60% lower power consumption; the Arbel RISC-V core surpasses Intel Lion Cove and AMD Zen 5.

name: WitnessAI
description: 构建AI安全护栏，确保AI系统安全、生产力和可用性。
why_matters: 专注AI安全防护，获GV和Qualcomm Ventures投资，总融资超8500万。
description_en: Build AI safety guardrails to ensure the safety, productivity, and availability of AI systems.
why_matters_en: Focusing on AI security protection, it received investment from GV and Qualcomm Ventures, with total financing exceeding 85 million.

name: Quadric
description: 提供设备端AI计算的半导体IP和工具，支持边缘AI芯片开发。
why_matters: 专注on-device AI芯片IP，获知名VC支持，总融资近7400万。
description_en: Provides semiconductor IP and tools for device-side AI computing to support edge AI chip development.
why_matters_en: Focusing on on-device AI chip IP, it is supported by well-known VCs and has total financing of nearly 74 million.

name: Salience Labs
description: Salience Labs 开发光子交换芯片，实现 AI 数据中心超低延迟高速度网络织构。
why_matters: ICM HPQC Fund 和 Applied Ventures 领投 3000 万美元 A 轮，剑桥大学分拆，支持多跳大集群连接，兼容现有基础设施。
description_en: Salience Labs develops photonic switching chips to achieve ultra-low latency and high-speed network fabric for AI data centers.
why_matters_en: ICM HPQC Fund and Applied Ventures led a $30 million Series A round, and the Cambridge University spin-out supports multi-hop large cluster connections and is compatible with existing infrastructure.

name: Runware
description: 构建所有AI的一站式API，Sonic推理引擎优化生成式AI性能。
why_matters: 5000万美元A轮由Dawn Capital领投，a16z Speedrun参投，扩展生成式AI推理优化。
description_en: Building a one-stop API for all AI, the Sonic inference engine optimizes generative AI performance.
why_matters_en: The US$50 million Series A round was led by Dawn Capital, with participation from a16z Speedrun, to expand generative AI reasoning optimization.

name: Alt
description: 日本AI解决方案和LLM开发公司，计划IPO。
why_matters: 东京AI初创Alt申请东京证交所Growth市场上市，发行750万股，预计市值170亿日元（约1.19亿美元），大和证券主承销。
description_en: Japanese AI solutions and LLM development company planning IPO.
why_matters_en: Tokyo AI startup Alt applied for listing on the Tokyo Stock Exchange's Growth Market, issuing 7.5 million shares with an estimated market value of 17 billion yen (approximately US$119 million). Daiwa Securities is the lead underwriter.

name: 01.AI（零一万物）
description: 李开复创立的中国大模型初创公司，开发国产高性能LLM。
why_matters: AI投资教父李开复创立，已测试数百亿参数模型，正扩展至300-700亿参数，强调中国本土LLM历史机遇，由Sinovation Ventures支持。
description_en: A Chinese large model start-up company founded by Kai-Fu Lee, which develops domestic high-performance LLM.
why_matters_en: Founded by AI investment godfather Kai-fu Lee, it has tested tens of billions of parameter models and is expanding to 30-70 billion parameters, emphasizing the historical opportunities of China's local LLM and supported by Sinovation Ventures.

name: Symbolic.ai
description: AI-native publisher platform优化编辑流程，包括研究、写作、事实核查、音频转录和SEO建议。
why_matters: 与News Corp签约，实现复杂研究任务生产力提升高达90%，标志媒体行业AI企业级采用里程碑。
criteria_met: 与News Corp等顶级媒体巨头合作验证产品，提供强大背书和参考案例。
source_title: AI journalism startup Symbolic.ai signs deal with Rupert Murdoch’s News Corp
description_en: The AI-native publisher platform optimizes the editorial process, including research, writing, fact-checking, audio transcription and SEO advice.
why_matters_en: Signed a contract with News Corp to increase productivity of complex research tasks by up to 90%, marking a milestone in the enterprise-level adoption of AI in the media industry.

name: Godot
description: 一家源自日本的初创公司，提供利用行为科学 AI 促进个人、组织和社会行为变革的可信 AI 平台。
why_matters: 在Dawn Capital主导的Series A中筹集总额11亿日元（约$7.3M），虽发源于神户但已在澳大利亚和维也纳设立据点并进军美国及亚洲市场，在大阪市实现大肠癌筛查率提升46%的实绩，荣获WHO奖项展示了在全球行为改变领域的创新性。
description_en: A startup from Japan that utilizes behavioral science AI to provide a reliable AI platform that promotes behavioral change in individuals, organizations, and society.
why_matters_en: Raised a total of 1.1 billion yen (approximately $7.3M) through Series A led by Dawn Capital, expanded from Kobe to the United States and Asia by opening bases in Australia and Vienna, achieved a 46% increase in colorectal cancer screening rates in Osaka City, and demonstrated innovation in the field of global behavior change by winning the WHO award.

name: Deepgram
description: 语音AI API平台，提供餐厅和得来速语音解决方案。
why_matters: C轮1.43亿美元融资，估值13亿美元，同时收购OfOne增强餐厅语音AI能力。
description_en: Voice AI API platform, providing restaurant and drive-thru voice solutions.
why_matters_en: Series C financing of US$143 million, with a valuation of US$1.3 billion, and the acquisition of OfOne to enhance restaurant voice AI capabilities.

name: 1mind

why_matters_en: US$30 million in Series A, just launched from stealth mode, representing the vertical AI agent growth category, with the sales automation market expected to reach US$15 billion in 2026.

why_matters_en: Accel led the investment and completed Series A only 3 months after its establishment. The AI ​​security track is heating up.

why_matters_en: AI physics engine, faster and cheaper than traditional simulation, new tool for engineers

description_en: LG’s home humanoid robot is the most talked about product at CES 2026. Dual 7-degree-of-freedom arms + 5-finger hands, capable of cooking, washing, and folding clothes. The "Zero Labor Home" vision is deeply integrated with the LG ThinQ ecosystem.

name: Sierra

why_matters: Bret Taylor(OpenAI董事会主席)+Clay Bavor，企业AI Agent标杆
latest_news: 2025-11: 21个月达$100M ARR，史上最快企业软件之一
description_en: Customer service AI Agent founded by former Salesforce co-CEO Bret Taylor. Achieved $100M ARR in 21 months, $10B valuation. SoFi, Ramp, Brex, etc. are all using it to handle refunds and account management end-to-end.

latest_news_en: 2025-11: Reaching $100M ARR in 21 months, one of the fastest enterprise software in history

name: GITAI

why_matters: 2023年完成约3000万美元B轮延伸融资，用于开发月球漫游车和寸虫机器人臂；到2025年推出深空任务自主机器人，减少太空行走需求。
description_en: Focused on space robotic systems, including autonomous robotic arms for satellite maintenance and space station missions.
why_matters_en: In 2023, approximately US$30 million in Series B extended financing will be completed to develop the lunar rover and the Inch Robot Arm; by 2025, autonomous robots for deep space missions will be launched to reduce the need for space walks.

name: Decagon
description: 企业AI智能体平台，专注客户服务和销售自动化
why_matters: 2025年11月融资$1.31亿Series C，估值$15亿；代表垂直AI智能体赛道的快速成长，销售自动化市场预计2026年达$150亿规模
description_en: Enterprise AI agent platform, focusing on customer service and sales automation
why_matters_en: Series C raised $131 million in November 2025, with a valuation of $1.5 billion; representing the rapid growth of the vertical AI intelligent agent track, the sales automation market is expected to reach $15 billion in 2026

name: Axion Technologies

why_matters_en: LinkBricks Ventures led a US$1.5 million seed round. It is a South Korean start-up established in 2024. It focuses on optimizing the AI ​​automated chip design process and has regional growth potential.

name: AheadComputing

description_en: Design 64-bit RISC-V applications processor IP that supports general-purpose computing and efficient AI workloads.
why_matters_en: Eclipse Ventures led a $21.5 million seed round, with Jim Keller personally participating in the investment. The RISC-V architecture innovation supports the efficient operation of AI, and the size of the seed round is significantly larger than conventional.

name: Biotics AI

description_en: AI-driven fetal ultrasound software that helps detect fetal abnormalities in ultrasound images has been approved by the FDA.
why_matters_en: TechCrunch Disrupt Battlefield 2023 winner, the first FDA-approved AI fetal abnormality detection tool, marking a medical AI regulatory milestone.

why_matters_en: Ranked 2nd among Japanese AI companies in terms of sales (16.893 billion yen), it has a dual-wheel drive of PKSHA ReSearch research department and PKSHA Product commercialization department. It has established significant competitive advantages in the field of natural language processing, and its services include supply chain optimization for large enterprises such as Asahi Group.

community_verdict.summary: 评论者认可Omnara的UI设计出色，并欣赏其支持从手机等设备访问AI代理的功能。多个用户提到OpenCode、OpenChamber和Happy等免费替代品，认为Omnara的功能可以通过Tailscale等工具实现，且收费20美元每月难以 оправдать。有些人质疑Omnara是否只是Claude Code的包装，并指出Claude iOS app已支持类似移动操作。 用户反馈既包含认可，也提出了执行层面的质疑。 对 PM 来说，关键是验证需求强度与可持续增长。

top_comments_sample: I have been hungry to do more work from my cell phone. It's ridiculous to be forced to sit in front of a computer to work with AI. My current solution is to have claude (--dangerously-skip-permissions) listen for messages in my slack DMs to myself and take action in response to those messages. I would happily switch to something better. Why is Omnara better?
OpenCode is free and has an excellent front end for this kind of work
OpenChamber is a good option you use opencode
sounds really close to fart, in japanese.

I don't quite see the appeal, because Claude Code already supports something similar. They spin up container to make the changes in and then open a PR. I can just use the Claude iOS app to do this. My computer doesn't need to be running or exposed to the internet.

I think someone should also mention Happy ( https://happy.engineering ), which has decent mobile clients and is currently MIT-licensed. Although I must say that Omnara's UI looks absolutely fantastic. Well done!
So you're just a Claude Code wrapper? Question to YC: how did this get funded?
There's certainly something to the "mass delegation" trend. My best rn is on email: https://ai-chat.email

Another option that does all this and more for open code: https://github.com/btriapitsyn/openchamber Not affiliated with that project, but have been using it for a few weeks and it blows every other 'GUI for the CLI agents' I've tried out of the water in terms of both features and just working snappily/consistently. Also totally free, and actively being improved by the solo maintainer and an active community of contributors. Omnara providing a tunnel for you is nice, but considering Tailscale is dead simple and free, feels hard to justify $20 a month for what looks like considerably less features than openchamber

Woah, I had this exact idea, down to the tunneling and local machine! I basically just coded up a Tailscale + caffeinate harness for my agents and it's been working super well. Your UI looks great though, glad to see more players in this space!

description_en: The London AI Research Laboratory builds superhuman intelligence through reinforcement learning rather than large language models. The goal is to create an infinite learning system that can learn autonomously and discover itself.
why_matters_en: Led by David Silver (creator of AlphaGo), the $1 billion seed round was led by Sequoia, with a $4 billion valuation, the largest seed round in European history. Core innovation: abandon the LLM paradigm, shift to reinforcement learning + experience cycle, and break through the bottleneck of human knowledge. Nvidia, Google, and Microsoft are involved in the negotiations.

community_verdict.summary: 社区重点讨论了产品价值与落地细节。评论情绪整体偏正向，并反复提及可用性与真实场景。这类反馈可用于判断短期需求强度是否能转化为持续增长。 用户反馈既包含认可，也提出了执行层面的质疑。 对 PM 来说，关键是验证需求强度与可持续增长。

top_comments_sample: You need to filter out unavailable and obsolete products. My prompt (in Fast mode, as a guest): """ I need to take a trip to Turkey for a week. I would like to take a camera with me, but my Nikon Coolpix P1100 is too heavy for that (1.5 kg). I do need some zoom, let's say up to 250 mm but the exact maximum focal length is negotiable. """ The model seemingly failed to realize that the request is about a high-zoom compact camera. Only one of three different suggestions featured a compact camera, "Canon - PowerShot ELPH 360 HS - A Full HD Video 20.2-Megapixel Digital Camera - Black", on BestBuy ( https://www.bestbuy.com/product/p/J7C86SHZLX ), and it's unavailable there. So, zero success, but t
I would like to know why those combination is recommended, tbh.
Nice overall! It would be good if we it can take my location into consideration.. So it suggests items available in the closest place nearby.

Tried it for a birthday party setup and got a reasonable list of things I hadn't thought about. Saved me the usual back-and-forth between Pinterest, Google & Amazon.The tier breakdown is actually useful, most of the time I just want the middle option and it's right there. The Deep mode worked better for me. it asked follow up questions before building the cart and the results were more personalized than quick mode.
Thanks for the great comments guys. Trying to reply to all. Appreciate all of you using the product.

This is great. thanks for taking your time to try such an ellaborate prompt. Interestingly the recommended bestbuy link is available in my location (California). Fastmode doesn't look at your location unless you are signed in. Wondering if time permits, can you try completing your profile and try deep mode? Or i can give a try as well if you share your city or country and share you the cart link to validate. Thanks!
Great thought. We initially thought about adding an interpretability view to show users on why they got each products. Will consider adding that.
Thanks for the feedback. Seems like a bug, if the profile includes the location, it should be used. Let me look into it.

Appreciate your time in testing our product. Glad it worked better in deep mode. Will note that feedback. Can you confirm if the fast mode was used after completing your profile? Generally if the profile is complete and if you signed-in for the fast mode, the results should be reasonably good if you are searching for any family members like "birthday party for my daughter", "beach trip with my kids" etc. Since deep mode gets more context we expect it be far superior in terms of result quality. Feel free to try more queries. Use support@whattobuy.app for any direct feedback or post it here. Thanks again!
"Cebu, Philippines" would be a good-enough approximation.

top_comments_sample: Localization for ui only. Im- and exported data only in standard formats

A known issue.. have faced this personally long back (had to let it go back then since the use-cases was no more valid) ... but, will this help? https://github.com/freakynit/smart-date-parser This does maintain context based on past successful parses. Disclaimer: This is fully opus generated, but do have test cases (in usage.js ... i know.. it's not what it's for.. but it is what it is).

That's the ideal, but unfortunately not always an option when you're on the receiving end. We're building a data cleaning tool, so the whole point is dealing with messy user-uploaded CSVs where we don't control the export format. If we could mandate ISO 8601 everywhere, life would be much simpler. But the reality is people copy-paste from Excel, export from legacy systems, or hand-edit CSVs, and we need to handle what shows up.

Thanks for sharing this! The context-based approach is interesting. Maintaining state from past successful parses to resolve ambiguity is essentially what we do too, though we batch it (scan first 50 values) rather than doing it incrementally. The incremental approach has the advantage of adapting mid-column if formats shift, which we've seen in datasets that were manually concatenated from different sources. Will take a look at the repo.
All thanks to Opus :)
